summary: The task is complete in substance. Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, and deploy/nginx.conf align with port 3000, /app/data SQLite persistence, and /app/logs logging. The operator/config/security/reliability/frontend docs now match the implemented routes, auth modes, commands, logging behavior, and revocation route. Remaining non-blocking deployment debt is explicit in the tech debt tracker. The recorded mandatory deterministic gates all passed, including npm run verify and npm run start:smoke.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Docker/Nginx artifacts align with port 3000 exposure and SQLite volume expectations.
Docs match actual commands, routes, auth modes, base URL behavior, and logging behavior.
Debt tracker is explicit and current for remaining non-blocking debt.
Full verify and startup smoke passed in the deterministic check summary.
All required checks passed: lint, typecheck, build, unit, E2E, start:smoke, and verify.
Task maps to final hardening/operator-configuration scope without adding broad out-of-scope product features.
Operator handoff documents Ralph one-cycle operation, unattended loop operation, status/artifact inspection, and queue exhaustion behavior.
